diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,144 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Handler creation interface
+- Reads as: Handler factory helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory for binding handlers to Hono instances
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Route handler types
+- Reads as: Type definitions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.test.ts, src/router/*
+- Safe summary: Defines route handler input/output types
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WebSocket socket handler
+- Reads as: WebSocket helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.test.ts, src/utils/socket
+- Safe summary: Manages WebSocket connections with handler support
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: cookie, removeCookie, serializeCookie
+- Reads as: Cookie helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.test.ts, src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Set, get, and remove cookies with serialization
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: describeRoute, testRoutes, TestHono
+- Reads as: Testing helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.test.ts, src/utils/validate
+- Safe summary: Testing utilities for Hono routes and validations
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: adaptor, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: Adapter helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.test.ts, src/types.ts
+- Safe summary: Generic adapter for creating environment-agnostic middleware
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, cssCommon
+- Reads as: CSS helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.test.tsx, src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Dynamic CSS class generation with interpolation
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: CSS utility functions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core CSS helper with class name and keyframe generation
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy function
+- Reads as: Proxy helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.test.ts, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Fetch wrapper for proxying with header management
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Development helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.test.ts, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Shows registered routes and router name for dev tools
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: HTML helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.test.ts, src/utils/html.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping and callback-aware string building
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: SSG helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.test.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Static site generation with hooks and middleware
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, generateFilePath, beforeRequestHook, afterResponseHook
+- Reads as: SSG core implementation
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.test.tsx, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG logic for fetching and saving pages
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, joinPaths, dirname, isMiddleware
+- Reads as: SSG utility functions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.test.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Route filtering and path manipulation utilities
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: SSG middleware
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Middleware for SSG request handling
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: Streaming helper (index)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Main entry point re-exporting streaming helpers
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: Streaming implementation
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/utils/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: ReadableStream-based streaming response
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: Server-Sent Events implementation
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.test.tsx, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/utils/html.ts
+- Safe summary: SSE streaming with event and ID support
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: Text streaming wrapper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/context.ts
+- Safe summary: Convenience wrapper for plain text streaming
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: Accepts helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.test.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/utils/accept.ts
+- Safe summary: Helper for matching Accept header
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: ParseAccept, Accept, parseAccept, defaultMatch
+- Reads as: Accept parsing helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/utils/accept.ts
+- Safe summary: Parses Accept header and selects best match
+## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo
+- Reads as: ConnInfo helper types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts, src/context.ts
+- Safe summary: Type for extracting connection info from context
+## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
+- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo
+- Reads as: ConnInfo types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/context.ts
+- Safe summary: Core types for connection info including type
